title: ClearVision
description: Removes Blindness, Darkness, and water/lava/powder snow fog and overlays.
body:
# ClearVision

Removes visual obstructions from Blindness, Darkness, and environmental overlays in Minecraft

---

## Features

**Status Effects**
- Blindness: Removes fog, blur, and sky darkening
- Darkness: Removes fog, dimming, and sky darkening
![no blindness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc460e84619678240ccf4e6c8544597b2bd8cac9_0.webp)

**Environment**
- Water: Removes fog and overlay
![water clear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49613928e33c0cf36145d5e6720b50ad69aba3b6_0.webp)
- Lava: Removes fog and overlay
![lava clear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be5370c403a8a726a10abe3aa3f53e214c12a451_0.webp)
- Powder Snow: Removes fog and overlay
![powdered snow clear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61bff4f5d8f30622fcfec3f59a9fb43b3bc3d85c_0.webp)
---

## Usage

**Default Keybind:** `V`

Toggle on/off to remove visual effects. Change keybind in:
`Options -> Controls -> Key Binds -> ClearVision (Miscellaneous category)`

Config screen is available via Mod Menu.


---

## Important

> **Gameplay mechanics are preserved.** Blindness still prevents sprinting. Only visual effects are removed.

- Client-side only
- Anti-cheat safe
